summary: First test run for LMB Illustrations app. All backend CRUD tests pass (6/6). All frontend navigation flows work correctly: HomePage renders with logo/title/buttons, sessions list, new session creation with file upload, stepper, Step 2 Pictos. Full end-to-end workflow tested from file upload → session creation → Step 2 display.

issues: Home page screenshot captured mid fade-in animation shows very low contrast (nearly invisible elements). This is a CSS animation artifact, actual rendered state is fine.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py not reviewed in detail - should verify MongoDB _id exclusion in session responses
StepImport OCR endpoint not tested (as instructed - requires real image + GPT)
Image generation (fal.ai) not tested (as instructed - costs API credits)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test sessions via API. One test session 'Session LMB — 14/03/2026' with 'Mon article test' article was created during frontend UI flow test (not cleaned up, visible in sessions list).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All basic flows verified: HomePage (logo, title, 2 buttons), /sessions page (list + new session btn + back home), /session/new (stepper, upload zone, file input, titre-input, btn-run-ocr, btn-continue-step1), session creation via POST API, navigation to /session/:id with Step 2 Pictos visible. OCR and image generation endpoints NOT tested (skip per instructions). Backend 6/6 CRUD tests pass.
